{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Turks and Caicos Islands women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=June 2021}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name                = Turks and Caicos Islands
| Badge               = Turks & Caicos Islands Football Association (2015).png
| Badge_size          = 215px
| Nickname            = 
| Association         = [[Turks and Caicos Islands Football Association]] (TCIFA)
| Confederation       = {{nowrap|[[CONCACAF]] (North America)}}
| Sub-confederation   = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach               = Vacant
| Captain             = Vacant
| Most caps           = [[Billy Forbes (footballer, born 1990)|Billy Forbes]] (36)
| Top scorer          = [[Billy Forbes (footballer, born 1990)|Billy Forbes]] (19)
| Home Stadium        = [[TCIFA National Academy]]
| FIFA Trigramme      = TCA
| FIFA Rank           = {{FIFA World Rankings|TCA}}
| FIFA max            = 158
| FIFA max date       = February 2008
| FIFA min            = 211
| FIFA min date       = October 2018
| Elo Rank            = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Turks and Caicos Islands}}
| Elo max             = 205
| Elo max date        = 4 September 2006
| Elo min             = 214
| Elo min date        = September 2018
<!-- Home Kit -->
| pattern_la1  = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_b1   = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_ra1  = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_sh1  = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_so1  = _turkscaicos24h
| leftarm1     = 
| body1        = 
| rightarm1    = 
| shorts1      = 
| socks1       = 000080
<!-- Away Kit -->
| pattern_la2  = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_b2   = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_ra2  = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_sh2  = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_so2  = _turkscaicos24a
| leftarm2     = 
| body2        = 
| rightarm2    = 
| shorts2      = 
| socks2       = FFF000

| First game          = {{nowrap|{{fb|BAH}} 3–0 {{fb-rt|TCA}}}}<br> ([[Nassau, Bahamas|Nassau]], Bahamas; 24 February 1999)
| Largest win         = {{nowrap|{{fb|SMA}} 2–5 {{fb-rt|TCA}}}}<br>([[Willemstad]], Curaçao; 10 October 2019)
| Largest loss        = {{fb|CUB}} 11–0 {{fb-rt|TCA}}<br>([[Havana]], Cuba; 8 September 2018)
| World cup apps      = 
| World cup first     = 
| World cup best      = 
| Regional name       = 
| Regional cup apps   = 
| Regional cup first  = 
| Regional cup best   = 
}}

The '''Turks and Caicos Islands national football team''' represents [[Turks and Caicos Islands]] in international football, and is controlled by the [[Turks and Caicos Islands Football Association]].

==History==
[[File:Turks and Caicos Islands FIFA World Cup.JPG|thumb|Turks and Caicos Islands team in 2004]]
Having formed a football association in 1996 and joined [[FIFA]] in 1998, Turks and Caicos Islands made its first appearance at an official FIFA competition when they entered the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification|2002 World Cup qualification]]. In March 2000, the team was knocked out in the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF Caribbean Zone#Group 2|first qualification round]] by [[Saint Kitts and Nevis national football team|St. Kitts and Nevis]] 14–0 on aggregate.

At the [[2006 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round#Group 3|2006 World Cup qualifying competition]], the side suffered a 7–0 aggregate loss against [[Haiti national football team|Haiti]] in February 2004.

In 2007, the federation completed construction of their first stadium, the [[Turks and Caicos National Stadium]],<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.tcifreepress.com/?q=node/842/print|title=IIS7|website=www.tcifreepress.com|access-date=13 July 2018|archive-date=13 July 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180713232812/http://www.tcifreepress.com/?q=node%2F842%2Fprint|url-status=live}}</ref> with the help of the FIFA Goal programme, and have committed themselves to building a broad base of football participation and support.{{Citation needed|date=March 2008}}

On February 6, 2008, the team achieved its first World Cup qualification win 2–1 against [[Saint Lucia national football team|Saint Lucia]] in the [[CONCACAF]] first round at home, but in the second leg played March 26, 2008, they were eliminated after they fell short having lost the away leg 0–2 in Saint Lucia for a 2–3 aggregate score.<ref>[https://web.archive.org/web/20080329154732/http://www.fifa.com/worldcup/news/newsid=722793.html#new+world+nine+move New World nine move on]&nbsp;– FIFA</ref>

The team went without a victory in an official game until June 3, 2014, when they beat the [[British Virgin Islands national football team|British Virgin Islands]] during the [[2014 Caribbean Cup qualification]], and as a result jumped from 207th to 181st in the FIFA rankings released during that month.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.fifa.com/worldranking/news/newsid=2406169/index.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140718075314/http://www.fifa.com//worldranking/news/newsid=2406169/index.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=18 July 2014|title=World champions Germany on top|last=FIFA.com|date=16 July 2014|website=fifa.com|access-date=13 July 2018}}</ref>

==Coaches==
{{div col|colwidth=25em}}
*{{flagicon|TCA}} [[Gino Pacitto]] (1999–2000)<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.fifa.com/fifa-tournaments/players-coaches/people=179509/index.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20171111041704/http://www.fifa.com/fifa-tournaments/players-coaches/people=179509/index.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=11 November 2017|title=FIFA Tournaments – Players & Coaches – PACITTO Gino|website=FIFA.com|access-date=13 July 2018}}</ref>
*{{flagicon|TCA}} [[Paul Crosbie]] (2003–2004)<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.fifa.com/fifa-tournaments/players-coaches/people=210357/index.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160305195907/http://www.fifa.com/fifa-tournaments/players-coaches/people=210357/index.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=5 March 2016|title=FIFA Tournaments – Players & Coaches – CROSBIE Paul|website=FIFA.com|access-date=13 July 2018}}</ref>
*{{flagicon|TCA}} [[Charles Cook (footballer, born 1972)|Charlie Cook]] (2006)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Matthew Green (English football coach)|Matthew Green]] (2008–2011)<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.fifa.com/fifa-tournaments/players-coaches/people=212536/index.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20171111042106/http://www.fifa.com/fifa-tournaments/players-coaches/people=212536/index.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=11 November 2017|title=FIFA Tournaments – Players & Coaches – GREEN Matthew|website=FIFA.com|access-date=13 July 2018}}</ref>
*{{flagicon|TCA}} [[Gary Brough]] (2011–2014)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Craig Harrington]] (2014–2015)
*{{flagicon|TCA}} [[Oliver Smith (football coach)|Oliver Smith]] (2015–2018)
*{{flagicon|USA}} [[Matt Barnes (soccer)|Matt Barnes]] (2018–2019)
*{{flagicon|JAM}} [[Omar Edwards]]    (2019–2022)
*{{flagicon|BEL}} [[Vital Borkelmans]] (2022)
*{{flagicon|TRI}} [[Keith Jeffrey (football manager)|Keith Jeffrey]] (2022–2023)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Hayden Mullins]] (2023)
*{{flagicon|TRI}} [[Keith Jeffrey (football manager)|Keith Jeffrey]] (2023)
*{{flagicon|ENG}} [[Ricky Hill]] (2023–2023)
*{{flagicon|JAM}} [[Aaron Lawrence]] (2023–2025)
{{div col end}}

==Results and fixtures==
{{Main|Turks and Caicos Islands national football team results}}

The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{football box collapsible
|format            = 1
|round             = [[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]]
|date              = August 13, 2025
|time              = 7:00
|team1             = {{fb-rt|VIR}}
|score             = 1–1
|report            = 
|team2             = {{fb|TCA}}
|goals1            = 
*[[Carmelo Rodríguez|Rodríguez]] {{goal|40}}
|goals2            = 
*[[Junior Paul|Paul]] {{goal|21}}
|aet               = yes
|penaltyscore      = 5–4
|penalties1        =
|penalties2        = 
|stadium           = [[Springdale High School|Jarrell Williams Bulldog Stadium]]
|location          = [[Springdale, Arkansas]], [[United States]]
|attendance        = 
|referee           = 
|result            = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format            = 1
|round             = [[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]]
|date              = August 14, 2025
|time              = 8:00
|team1             = {{fb-rt|TCA}}
|score             = 3-3
|report            = 
|team2             = {{flagicon|Arkansas}} [[Ozark United FC|Ozark United U19]]
|goals1            = 
|goals2            = 
|aet               = yes
|penaltyscore      = 5–4
|penalties1        =
|penalties2        = 
|stadium           = [[Springdale High School|Jarrell Williams Bulldog Stadium]]
|location          = [[Springdale, Arkansas]], [[United States]]
|attendance        = 
|referee           = 
|result            = W
}}
{{football box collapsible
|format            = 1
|round             = [[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]]
|date              = August 16, 2025
|time              = 1:00
|team1             = {{fb-rt|MHL}}
|score             = 2-3
|report            = 
|team2             = {{fb|TCA}}
|goals1            = 
|goals2            = 
|stadium           = [[Springdale High School|Jarrell Williams Bulldog Stadium]]
|location          = [[Springdale, Arkansas]], [[United States]]
|attendance        = 
|referee           = 
|result            = W
}}

==Players==
{{main|List of Turks and Caicos Islands international footballers}}

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup]] matches against the [[United States Virgin Islands national soccer team|United States Virgin Islands]] and the [[Marshall Islands national soccer team|Marshall Islands]] on 13 and 16 August 2025.<ref name="squad for the 2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup">{{cite web |title=Turks & Caicos Islands announce squad for the 2025 Outrigger Challenge Cup |date=4 July 2025 |url=https://rmi.soccer/2025/07/04/turks-caicos-islands-announce-squad-for-the-2025-outrigger-challenge-cup/ |publisher=Marshall Islands Soccer Federation |access-date=7 July 2025}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 7 September 2024, after the match against [[Belize national football team|Belize]].''

{{Nat fs g start}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Sebastian Turbyfield]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|12|19|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[United Premier Soccer League|Palm Beach Flames]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Samuel Harvey (footballer)|Samuel Harvey]]|age={{birth date and age|2009|10|15|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Cheshire Hall FC|Cheshire Hall]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kyle Belizaire]]|age={{Birth date and age|2006|5|26|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Cavalier F.C.|Cavalier]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Mackenson Cadet]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|1|20|df=y}}|caps=24|goals=0|club=[[SWA Sharks FC|SWA Sharks]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Keniel Clervil]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|6|23|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Academy Eagles FC|Academy Eagles]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Hency Gédéon]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|6|9|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Flamingo FC|Flamingo]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Anios Jean]]|age={{birth date and age|2008|5|1|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Cheshire Hall FC|Cheshire Hall]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ledson Jerome]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|12|28|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=1|club=[[SWA Sharks FC|SWA Sharks]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kendly Telusma]]|age={{birth date and age|2008|11|4|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Cheshire Hall FC|Cheshire Hall]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jeff Beljour]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|4|4|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=2|club=[[SWA Sharks FC|SWA Sharks]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Christopher Louisy]]|age={{Birth date and age|2005|4|6|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=0|club=[[Academy Eagles FC|Academy Eagles]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Emmanuel Martin (footballers)|Emmanuel Martin]]|age={{birth date and age|2007|5|26|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=1|club=[[Academy Eagles FC|Academy Eagles]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Rotskancy Mondelus]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Bridlington Town A.F.C.| Bridlington Town]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Callum Park]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|12|6|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[SWA Sharks FC|SWA Sharks]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Wepsdel Saintilus]]|age={{Birth date and age|2008|3|13|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Cheshire Hall FC|Cheshire Hall]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Maddox Zaidan-Jones]]|age={{Birth date and age|2008|2|6|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Berkshire School|Berkshire Bears]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Wilsony Charles]]|age={{birth date and age|2007|5|26|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=||clubnat=}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Billy Forbes (footballer, born 1990)|Billy Forbes]]|age={{Birth date and age|1990|12|13|df=y}}|caps=34|goals=19|club=[[SWA Sharks FC|SWA Sharks]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{Nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Junior Paul (footballer)|Junior Paul]]|age={{birth date and age|2001|6|14|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=4|club=[[SWA Sharks FC|SWA Sharks]]|clubnat=TCA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Schuyler Selver]]|age={{birth date and age|2008|2|20|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Orlando City SC|Orlando City]]||clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|15 October 2024}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Turks & Caicos Islands |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/191/Turks_Caicos_Islands.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Turks & Caicos Islands.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!class="unsortable" style="width:150px;"|Name
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
!class="unsortable" style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|align=left|[[Billy Forbes (footballer, born 1990)|Billy Forbes]]
|36
|19
|2008–2024
|-
|rowspan=2|2
|align=left|'''[[Wildens Delva]]'''
|25
|0
|2014–present
|-
|align=left|[[Lenford Singh]]
|25
|1
|2006–2022
|-
|4
|align=left|'''[[Mackenson Cadet]]'''
|24
|0
|2018–present
|-
|5
|align=left|'''[[Christopher Louisy]]'''
|20
|0
|2019–present
|-
|rowspan=2|6
|align=left|'''[[Raymond Burey]]'''
|19
|0
|2021–present
|-
|align=left|'''[[James Rene]]'''
|19
|0
|2011–present
|-
|8
|align=left|'''[[Junior Paul (footballer)|Junior Paul]]'''
|18
|4
|2022–present
|-
|rowspan=4|9
|align=left|'''[[Jeff Beljour]]'''
|17
|2
|2018–present
|-
|align=left|'''[[Widlin Calixte]]'''
|17
|2
|2015–present
|-
|align=left|[[Jose Elcius]]
|17
|1
|2018–2022
|-
|align=left|'''[[Callum Park]]'''
|17
|0
|2021–present
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{|class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
!class="unsortable" width=150px|Name
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
!class="unsortable" width=100px|Career
|-
|1
|align="left"|[[Billy Forbes (footballer, born 1990)|Billy Forbes]]
|19
|36
|{{#expr:19/36 round 2}}
|2008–2024
|-
|rowspan=2|2
|align="left"|[[Gavin Glinton]]
|4
|10
|{{#expr:4/10 round 2}}
|2004–2014
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Junior Paul (footballer)|Junior Paul]]'''
|4
|18
|{{#expr:4/18 round 2}}
|2022–present
|-
| rowspan="4" |8
|align="left"|[[Christopher Bryan]]
|2
|6
|{{#expr:2/6 round 2}}
|1999–2006
|-
|align="left"|[[Marco Fenelus]]
|2
|15
|{{#expr:2/15 round 2}}
|2011–2019
|-
|align=left|'''[[Jeff Beljour]]'''
|2
|17
|{{#expr:2/17 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|align="left"|'''[[Widlin Calixte]]'''
|2
|17
|{{#expr:2/17 round 2}}
|2015–present
|-
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]]
!rowspan=41|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|F|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|A|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
|colspan=8| ''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan=6| ''Not a FIFA member''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 14
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 7
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 2
| 1
| 0
| 1
| 2
| 3
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 10
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 4
| 12
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| 3
| 0
| 0
| 3
| 0
| 22
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| 2
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=7 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total||||{{Tooltip|0/7|Number of tournaments qualified for}}||||||||||||||15||1||2||12||7||69
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]]||colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|MEX}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]||colspan=8 rowspan=2|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|MEX}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]] ||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]||colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]||colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CAN}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]] ||colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CRC}}{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|-
| {{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CAN}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|-
|{{flagicon|USA}}{{flagicon|CAN}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|-
!'''Total'''||'''0 titles'''||'''0/18'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''||'''0'''
|}

===Caribbean Cup===

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[Caribbean Cup]] record
!!width=1% rowspan=28|
!colspan=6|Qualification record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Pld
!W
!D*
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
|{{flagicon|BAR}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]] 
|colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=9|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]] 
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
|-
|{{flagicon|CAY}} {{flagicon|JAM}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} {{flagicon|SKN}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} {{flagicon|TRI}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2
|0
|1
|1
|2
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|BRB}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]
|colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|3
|1
|0
|2
|4
|9
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=3|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]
|-
|{{flagicon|JAM}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|2
|1
|0
|2
|2
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6|''Did not enter''
|-
!Total
!0 Titles
!0/19
!0
!0
!0
!0
!0
!0
!7
!2
!1
!4
!8
!21
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan="20" |[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
! colspan="10" |League
! rowspan="7" |
! colspan="9" |Finals
|-
!Season
!Division
!Group
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! width="35" |{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/relegation at end of season}}
!'''Finals'''
!'''Result'''
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group D|D]]
|4
|2
|0
|2
|8
|17
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="4" |''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group A|A]]
|6
|3
|0
|3
|10
|16
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League#Group C 2|C]]
|4
|0
|1
|3
|3
|10
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|2
|10
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
!Total
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!18
!6
!1
!11
!23
!53
!'''—'''
!'''Total'''
!'''0 Titles'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
|}

==Head-to-head record==
{{#lst:Turks and Caicos Islands national football team results|Record by opponent}}

==Historical kits==
{| class="wikitable"
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _TCA1999white
| pattern_b   = _TCA1999white
| pattern_ra  = _TCA1999white
| pattern_sh  = _black_border
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = FFFFFF
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 1999 
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _TCA1999green
| pattern_b   = _TCA1999green
| pattern_ra  = _TCA1999green
| pattern_sh  = _white_border
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 0D452E
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 1999 
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _vneck
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = 
| pattern_so  = _joma_black
| leftarm     = FFFFFF
| body        = FFFFFF
| rightarm    = FFFFFF
| shorts      = FFFFFF
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 2004
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _TCA2006
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = 
| pattern_so  = _joma_white
| leftarm     = 0063AF
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 0063AF
| shorts      = 0063AF
| socks       = 0063AF
| title       = 2006
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _TCA2008H
| pattern_b   = _TCA2008H
| pattern_ra  = _TCA2008H
| pattern_sh  = _red_border
| pattern_so  = _whitestripe
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 1CDEE8
| socks       = FF0000
| title       = 2008 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _TCA2008A
| pattern_b   = _TCA2008A
| pattern_ra  = _TCA2008A
| pattern_sh  = _black_border
| pattern_so  = _blackstripe
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = FF0000
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 2008 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _TCA2011
| pattern_ra  = _TCA2011
| pattern_sh  = _white_border
| pattern_so  = _whitestripe
| leftarm     = 01185E
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 01185E
| socks       = 01185E
| title       = 2011 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _thin_border_on_white
| pattern_b   = _TCA2014H
| pattern_ra  = _thin_border_on_white
| pattern_sh  = _turks1516a
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 000042
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 000042
| shorts      = 
| socks       = 000042
| title       = 2014 Home
}}
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _IslasTurcasYCaicos16h
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = _joma_black
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 95DFFF
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 95DFFF
| shorts      = FFFFFF
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 2014 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _turks1516a
| pattern_b   = _turks1516a
| pattern_ra  = _turks1516a
| pattern_sh  = _turks1516a
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = 000042
| title       = 2015 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _turks1516h
| pattern_b   = _turks1516h
| pattern_ra  = _turks1516h
| pattern_sh  = _shorts
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = FFFFFF
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 2015 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _tca18h
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = 
| pattern_so  = _tca18h
| leftarm     = 00003E
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 00003E
| shorts      = 00003E
| socks       = 00003E
| title       = 2018 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _tca18a
| pattern_b   = _tca18a
| pattern_ra  = _tca18a
| pattern_sh  = 
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = FFFFFF
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 2018 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _tca21h
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = 
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 000050
| body        = 000050
| rightarm    = 000050
| shorts      = 000050
| socks       = 000050
| title       = 2019 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _whitefadeoutrightsashs
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = 
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 74AEC4
| body        = 74AEC4
| rightarm    = 74AEC4
| shorts      = FFFFFF
| socks       = FFFFFF
| title       = 2019 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _TCAh22
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = _joma_white2
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 002AB3
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 002AB3
| shorts      = 003CFF
| socks       = 002AB3
| title       = 2022 Home
}}
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = 
| pattern_b   = _TCA2022A
| pattern_ra  = 
| pattern_sh  = _white_border
| pattern_so  = 
| leftarm     = 7A9FCF
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 7A9FCF
| shorts      = 002448
| socks       = 7A9FCF
| title       = 2022 Away
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_b   = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_ra  = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_sh  = _turkscaicos24h
| pattern_so  = _turkscaicos24h
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = 000080
| title       = 2024 Home
}}
|
{{Football kit 
| pattern_la  = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_b   = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_ra  = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_sh  = _turkscaicos24a
| pattern_so  = _turkscaicos24a
| leftarm     = 
| body        = 
| rightarm    = 
| shorts      = 
| socks       = FFF000
| title       = 2024 Away
}}
|}

Sources:<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEh6GQjEyHaBOTYJ6F_qfNNoIbUTwCyERUpcwrbaRBcPiEDAjAH_-396p78WpQK6xvXQyP2jgY-uSxBdBs5AUwZabU5WJjukJWMLrJKn8wjetVvI5hax-229fvJ36u3K-Kp1VuJA6TqZ51aWrj9n6Xp5upCvAQOOTG4nZlqJDVB157KdqZ2nwCtaf2cA97A/w640-h396/turcas%20y%20caicos%201999%20pd.jpg | title= 1999}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiol0rOTGXBPT7Z0ggBmiV3RKnJj0o3qY6wJzPQECOrxjFvSOhYJEZeLZgKKUAtvg_pqPx4bNfzeAy58y09L6V6xAoE1Jb9WNBPNPh0AwVZp9yvihtpPzqPnmMv9aDNA5-J3eUrEKLlEyvZ5SRePnJt_FGBrjSnO24oZdc8C2NntdQgMApK1q7qcNzcru0/w640-h446/turcas%20y%20caicos%201999%20pl.jpg | title= 1999}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjt91ezXxT2fn6LO7O1PWuuZ8zATKGbxoo4dYk3Kt0Y5cbyJOQ0cCUdb_4fGjSkWXww0U_Y3YEyajWQVG0WHUyC1iCl3N2sR3bJFrczuLGxfAOLNYh2d7llRXgsEHkul51Ib8xhqQgmTxJPo_xdQa7qBDoBYucxyyEge62eLDwOYv4Jl-RqprHH5a0KIsU/w640-h426/turcas%20y%20caicos%202004%20haiti.jpg | title= 2004}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg4jy6qtzAF1RUZbfY4UZdMLfB2SEf33TFitryjbS7RYJfXVfnQVEpHgBiVxc8aCOhp46tb3GfSZqW5yvZpUtLVijoUoRkof1ctwZqNDp_7Bp-WTmk7DE85WgsM2uL5MXpcH5Ju21JRlATFpTNHISCV8lMp-NtjrusOGjPBJ5i0R3rG-XazbtJTlK_meOg/w640-h480/turcas%20y%20caicos%202006%20f.jpg | title= 2006}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://tcweeklynews.com/2-19-2008-9-17-02-AM-10176598.jpg | title= 2008}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcR8y690LNpGB6XX2LgluKJ_pAAi8aym9L0TdKc2j965ZzluoA1stpXBxHle0F1UmPoDqFc | title= 2008}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.footballkitarchive.com/turks-caicos-2011-home-kit/ | title= 2011}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://issuu.com/tcweeklynews/docs/tcwn_july-9-15_all_pages/42 | title= 2011| date= 8 July 2011}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://theworstintheworld.wordpress.com/2014/05/31/caribbean-cup-aruba-1-0-turks-caicos-islands/ | title= 2014| date= 31 May 2014}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiVfMPDYMjpqdMQ7kZ10zqdOA4Bi9qX_ZXW08FxDtJ4klAl3ukj7XJKYvtnHSUv3vzJkAvwzFnb9fDlV4i8xMexajsihEsFN_pPhibgHwaGDOcM8jTKFu4LpwnNjGFMY9Z-5wMlbheAchkGG-EeqZM1fRYHhXLU-wf83jbFZr5hpNtdYvvyyuNVm3nhWyg/w640-h428/turcas%20y%20caicos%202014%20hefu.jpg | title= 2014}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEh18GbPyIlNlD2whl-zYGe1vNSCewNfgr7n1tBAoXdeIuYzUuO-I98NDXETM0CoErzMxwy9Wix1i1cGHv9XWVzRw4eiaxQCedim28f3DuV4klcwpBu1k75Ko2pITc8UyfJYuUxfbrifUn1Ynt4Km9ahoFl4WcwVzn3CVkPFOeCmPsWYe3Gv59TO8vH0b58/w640-h426/turcas%20y%20caicos%202015%20ejgi.jpg | title= 2015}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.concacaf.com/es/eliminatoria-copa-mundial-hombres/article/islas-turcas-y-caicos-mira-hacia-el-futuro/ | title= 2015| date= 2 August 2021}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEh4MNV4tYpyVlYU6BPtnQ82XWTQRUPehZR1uYLZdmtObcYizGAfvwoJDFZLypBiscczzMXWvRgFxtY4HInxxbpCjeJrIttAxc14iPmU8poOng9HSjU0Il_hr8xY13JBPTj32xLtamGi6yyr3JqjHykpmOzPkjpgpVz0O39_VHf28BeUiudG3yIWrjrcaQE/w640-h412/turcas%20y%20caicos%202018%20guyana.jpg | title= 2018}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiNeLAOF7nPnqk9hLHp2-sJAaHbdI1mj3yuC4B71N5DvGwPdhb0AQTe9xtYgglp-0kOcoTGJyAz5_CSUaG5uO9VsG3FcRp7oJl7JU9Hxv1mnti-I2nT_xj-q0NH8nK5vsBpmmFJZ_YgLu7gBokPoreSSO1WdVetv02GgcJs8YYJtWKWaetS-iEb6U11AUw/w640-h428/turcas%20y%20caicos%202019%20opf.jpg | title= 2018}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEgsmFZ7jXfh5Y5HTjb5C4lqjRzrFfuA5Ix4D0cPfWj-DSOtfjVphqzbcF0VqZBj7HR89e8B5B1nw83O3uEFPMBwFCZ2Zy5MWsNMrP0MOcN8Qx7GLQWGf86qM6tutQYZKawwxud_b-5zKFGMzugCnaOmjvZbUjt58WBKMeexhwkCuNLsTZ4dBioQcsycPbA/w640-h426/turcas%20y%20caicos%202019%20eopf.jpg | title= 2019}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.concacaf.com/nations-league/news/turks-and-caicos-islands-and-sint-maarten-ready-for-rematch-of-thriller/ | title= 2019| date= 14 February 2021}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiMBFKjyKAWC86cywLoDGgc3tVBJyd4nGfuacSanpMeH9ixErgZwyAFHP2b2TPivk6g7M9d6ROBxJfX4az7q5MhsVPxR0cH9EurlE9vhcPpacPU9jj4tvy4V6_4x3E1mcV04u71HEzHJL7Jqoy6tL6PMgea4Wy17bqy0s48iQtR26PffzfDTl7QUZ2TdhY/w640-h480/turcas%20y%20caicos%202022%20p.jpg | title= 2022}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEj9UkUudzhZhbFp7pVl1TohVkbMUSRrQ1mXQx9_xQffBgM08W9871QvBMazc-leTyOdPa2pWOGIiQlxkJYwRRXI7sEYgLH0PicVF-MfDmQeL0bNc6bGek1J_E7D2GkYbOucGrr4CCHs7Crm3aW_4AByc1RJc7L5b65aROYMmPx0cgYLF9_Y3cpaYmZpAZQ/w640-h426/turcas%20y%20caicos%202022%20pd.jpg | title= 2022}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.instagram.com/tcifa_/p/C5B_oHTvm-b/?img_index=1 | title= 2024}}</ref>
<ref>{{cite web | url=https://pbs.twimg.com/media/GIEqwN8X0AA4RQo.jpg | title= 2024}}</ref>

==References==
<references/>

==External links==
* [https://www.tcifootballassociation.com/ Official website]&nbsp;– Turks and Caicos Islands FA
* Földesi, László. [https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/turkscaicos-recintlp.html Appearances and Goals for Turks and Caicos Islands] at RSSSF.com
* [http://www.planetworldcup.com/CUPS/2006/tci_story.html&nbsp;– "The Turks and Caicos Story"]&nbsp;– Planet World Cup

{{Turks and Caicos Islands national football team}}
{{Football in the Turks and Caicos Islands}}
{{UK National Football teams}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of the Turks and Caicos Islands}}

[[Category:Turks and Caicos Islands national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
